mapper.sql: id, lock_version as version, biz_no, title, summary, body, draft_version, published_version, workflow_status, current_snapshot_id, last_review_comment, created_at, updated_at

if.test: request != null and request.status != null and request.status.size() > 0
request != null and request.keyword != null and request.keyword != ''

mapper.select: select from content_draft order by updated_at desc, id desc

select workflow_status as status, count(*) as cnt from content_draft
group by workflow_status
mapper.insert: insert into content_draft ( lock_version, biz_no, title, summary, body, draft_version, published_version, workflow_status, current_snapshot_id, last_review_comment, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{version}, #{bizNo}, #{title}, #{summary}, #{body}, #{draftVersion}, #{publishedVersion}, #{workflowStatus}, #{currentSnapshotId}, #{lastReviewComment}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update:
update content_draft set title = #{title}, summary = #{summary}, body = #{body}, draft_version = #{draftVersion}, published_version = #{publishedVersion}, workflow_status = #{workflowStatus}, current_snapshot_id = #{currentSnapshotId}, last_review_comment = #{lastReviewComment}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, lock_version = lock_version + 1 where id = #{id} and lock_version = #{expectedVersion} and biz_no = #{bizNo} and workflow_status in
#{status}
